data.title: Write RED tests for SC-4 and SC-2 guards
data.description: Extend tests/unit/scripts/test-apply-attribution-trailers.sh with: test_script_exits_0_without_modifying_commit_msg_when_jsonl_absent() (SC-4: rm JSONL, run script, test $? -eq 0 && diff commit.txt), test_script_exits_0_without_modifying_commit_msg_when_jsonl_empty() (SC-4: :> JSONL, same check), test_script_exits_0_without_modifying_commit_msg_when_attribution_disabled() (SC-2: write config with attribution.enabled=false + populated JSONL -> exit 0, file unchanged). Use config-file mock (temp dso-config.conf) not bare env var. Tests fail (RED). TDD exemption: test-writing task.
